title: When Kamala Harris Met Xi Jinping
description: USA Vice President Kamala Harris and Chinese President Xi Jinping met at the Asia-Pacific Economic Cooperation summit in Thailand.
keywords: India News, columns, interviews, news India, breaking news
snippet: For almost two years after Joe Biden and Kamala Harris were sworn in as POTUS and Veep, there were no face to face meetings with Xi Jinping, who anointed himsel...
